Josh explained that this is the hotel's strategy to maximize revenue during a busy time, and went on to say that he appreciated the amont of people that Mellissa"s race will be bringing to the town of Banff, so on one hand you recognize the potential of many racers and spectators coming to stay but really are not willing to give an acutual viable discount to the masses that will only be staying for the two nights, keep in mind were not talking about a $200.00 room here these rooms are over $400.00 per night, In my opinion Josh sometimes a better buisness strategy is to recognize your target customer for the event taking place and have your promotional plan make sense for all.
